title: Kochi,  — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kochi, : cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kochi is a city in with a population of 335,000. A sunny coastal city on Shikoku’s southern coast, known for its vibrant Sunday market, fresh seafood, and Katsurahama Beach.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
